filesystem.description: File system operations for reading, writing, and managing project files

agentic-tools.description: Advanced task management and agent memories with project-specific storage - unlimited task hierarchy, persistent agent context, git-trackable data

automa.description: Project management automation tools - documentation health, task alignment, duplicate detection, security scanning, and automation opportunities

context7.description: Context7 MCP server - provides up-to-date, version-specific documentation and code examples. Access current documentation by appending 'use context7' to prompts. Ensures accurate code generation with latest API references.

git.description: Git version control operations - AI can understand git history, help with commit messages, and understand branch structure and diffs

semgrep.description: Security scanning for code analysis - checks for security vulnerabilities, bugs, and code quality issues. Required by .cursorrules for trading software security validation.

tractatus_thinking.description: Tractatus Thinking MCP server for logical concept analysis and structured thinking - breaks down complex concepts into atomic truths, reveals multiplicative relationships, and finds missing elements

sequential_thinking.description: Sequential Thinking MCP server for structured problem-solving and implementation workflow - converts structural understanding from Tractatus Thinking into actionable implementation steps
